expectations.text: Shows complete YAML config with correct top-level sections (infisical, auth, sinks, templates)
expectations.evidence: Uses different structure with agentVersion, logLevel, auth.machineIdentity, infisicalApiUrl, secretSyncs - not the standard Infisical Agent format with infisical/auth/sinks/templates sections

expectations.text: Uses listSecrets or listSecretsByProjectSlug template function with correct 4-arg signature
expectations.evidence: Uses generic placeholder syntax 'DATABASE_URL=postgresql://...' but does not show listSecrets or listSecretsByProjectSlug function calls

expectations.text: Uses correct Go template syntax ({{- with ... }} / {{- range . }} / {{ .Key }}={{ .Value }})
expectations.evidence: Uses simple placeholder syntax '{{ DB_USER }}', '{{ DB_PASSWORD }}' but not Go template with 'with', 'range' control structures

expectations.text: Includes destination-path pointing to a .env file
Mentions execute.command option for triggering app restart on change
expectations.evidence: Shows 'onSyncSuccess: command: npm restart' and 'onSyncFailure' with alert command
